struct Model {
    weights: Vec<f64>,
    name: String,
}

fn load_model(name: &str) -> Model {
    // simulate expensive model load
    Model {
        weights: vec![0.0; 1_000_000],
        name: name.to_string(),
    }
}

struct App {
    sentiment_model: Model,
    translation_model: Model,
    summarization_model: Model,
}

fn init_app() -> App {
    // BAD: load all models eagerly, even if features are not used
    App {
        sentiment_model: load_model("sentiment"),
        translation_model: load_model("translation"),
        summarization_model: load_model("summarization"),
    }
}
